title: The Lost Art of Connecting
author: Susan McPherson
subline: Gather. Ask. Do. The three steps to genuine human connection.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A network of dots — small, scattered, unconnected. ONE pair is connected by a single red line. The book is about finding the connections. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <g fill="#4c4c4c">
      <circle cx="-560" cy="-300" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-380" cy="-360" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-200" cy="-280" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-50" cy="-380" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="120" cy="-300" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="300" cy="-360" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="480" cy="-280" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-600" cy="-100" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-440" cy="-120" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-260" cy="-80" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-80" cy="-140" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="-80" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="280" cy="-140" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="460" cy="-100" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="600" cy="-160" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-540" cy="80" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-340" cy="100" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-160" cy="60" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="120" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="200" cy="60" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="380" cy="100" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="560" cy="80" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-580" cy="260" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-400" cy="300" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-220" cy="240" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="-40" cy="300" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="160" cy="260" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="340" cy="300" r="9"/>
      <circle cx="520" cy="240" r="9"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The ONE red line connecting two dots -->
    <line x1="100" y1="-80" x2="280" y2="-140" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="100" cy="-80" r="14" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="280" cy="-140" r="14" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Whisper -->
    <text x="190" y="-180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">CONNECT</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">A FIELD OF PEOPLE, MOST STILL UNMET</text>
</svg>
rationale: A constellation of 30 graphite dots spread across the lower 2/3. Two of them — slightly above center — are circled in red, and a single thick red line links them. The whisper 'CONNECT' in red sits between them. The composition shows the book's thesis: most people are floating alone, the lost art is making that one red link.
